# Testing Guide

Guide for testing the project.

## Running Tests

```bash
cargo test
cargo test --all-features
```

## Component Tests

### hook-builder

```bash
cd components/hook-builder
cargo test
```

### cli-core

```bash
cd components/cli-core
cargo test
```

### git-filter

```bash
cd components/git-filter
cargo test
```

### worktree-runner

```bash
cd components/worktree-runner
cargo test
```

```bash
cargo xtask gen-docs-comprehensive --validate
```
